entry.value: camps were abandoned early 2025, we verified on the imagery date Apr 11, 2025

tag.value: This wizard can help you set up your JOSM environment to make it more suitable to work on route relations
How many tags do you want to see?
For which functionality would you like to add icons to the toolbar
Would you like to add these map paint styles?
Would you like to add some convenient Overpass API queries for downloading specific OSM data?

entry.value: Data: Set buildings shape to circle
Data: Set buildings shape to rectangle
Toolbar: Draw boundaries of downloaded data
Tool: Generate a grid of ways from four nodes.

dialogs/search(searchExpression=R building\=yes nodes:5-99 OR nodes:1-3){name=building\=yes nodes:5-99 OR nodes:1-3,icon=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Patrik-Br/MyPaintStyle/main/JOSM_settings/toolbar_icons/5plus_nodes_building.jpg}
